title: NYU Shanghai Creativity + Innovation Fellowship
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
NYU Shanghai Creativity + Innovation Fellowship
The NYU Shanghai Creativity + Innovation Fellowship empowers students to critically and creatively engage with China’s dynamic innovation landscape. This selective fellowship brings together a global cohort of students united by their passion for exploring the intersections of design, business, and culture while studying in Shanghai, one of the world’s most dynamic cities.
Program Highlights
Opening Retreat: The fellowship kicks off with a retreat to help Fellows intentionally reflect and design their fellowship project.
Opening Retreat: The fellowship kicks off with a retreat to help Fellows intentionally reflect and design their fellowship project.
Behind-the-Scenes Experiences: Fellows will have access to participate in trips across China, gaining behind-the-scenes access to innovators, entrepreneurs, and creatives in China who are shaping the future of their industries and society.
Behind-the-Scenes Experiences: Fellows will have access to participate in trips across China, gaining behind-the-scenes access to innovators, entrepreneurs, and creatives in China who are shaping the future of their industries and society.
Grants for Project Support: Study away fellows can apply for grants of up to 6,000 RMB to carry out their own project exploring creativity and innovation in China during the semester.
Grants for Project Support: Study away fellows can apply for grants of up to 6,000 RMB to carry out their own project exploring creativity and innovation in China during the semester.
Creative Showcase: The fellowship culminates with a final event that helps Fellows to synthesize their experiences and learning.
Creative Showcase: The fellowship culminates with a final event that helps Fellows to synthesize their experiences and learning.
Key Benefits
Gain exclusive access to amazing and unique travel opportunities and insider experiences.
Belong to a vibrant cohort of like-minded and motivated peers from different campuses and schools.
Enhance your study away experience in Shanghai and demonstrate its unique value to future employers and graduate schools.
Application
Students may apply through the Study Away portal under the "Checklist" tab. To apply to study for a semester at NYU Shanghai, see here for details.Questions? Please see the Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) for more information.
